questionHtml: Write the half-equation for the reaction occurring at the anode (negative electrode).
markschemeHtml:
Fe (s) → Fe2+ (aq) + 2e− ✔

 

Accept equilibrium arrow.

Do not award ECF for Cu (s) → Cu2+ (aq) + 2e−.
